creator: nvl@crde.me
text:
When launching znc 1.6.1 on FreeBSD amd64 10.2-RELEASE-p8:
- it's impossible to connect to the bouncer
- in top, the znc process has the state umtxn
- cannot kill the process

Before upgrading from 10.1-RELEASE-p24 to 10.2-RELEASE-p8 the program worked fine. I’ve tried rebuilding znc.
